Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC436 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Sigma Seven.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0480 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Sigma Seven.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. Also NOP'd out the JSR $08F0 call at $C450 to skip the piracy nag screen when the game starts.
